suite.name: Smoke

kw.name: Start Mdb
kw.doc: Spawn mdb.sh and wait for its first prompt.

kw.name: Connect Pkob4
kw.msg: Connected to MPLAB Simulator (TEJOONE_BENCH=sim). No physical board required.
kw.doc: Select the target device and the configured bench.

kw.name: Program
kw.doc: Program the target with the given .elf file.

test.name: LATJ Matches MCC Configuration

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Read Symbol
kw.doc: Read a symbol (C variable or named SFR) and return its integer value.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: After programming, the LATJ register must equal the value set by MCC on LATJ7 (80).

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Quit
kw.doc: Send 'Quit' to MDB and wait for the process to exit.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

suite.doc:
Smoke test for the TejoOne firmware via MPLAB PKoB4.
Drives the on-board PKoB4 debugger through MDB. Programs the target with the current default.elf and reads the PR2 Timer 2 period register to confirm it matches the value set by the MCC configuration.
IMPORTANT: Close any active MPLAB X / VS Code debug session before running this suite. Only one client can own the PKoB4 at a time.
